grants.description_en: An international competition by Caltech Engineers Without Borders that lets students demonstrate their science and engineering knowledge through practical projects.
grants.description_uz: Caltech Engineers Without Borders tomonidan tashkil etilgan ushbu xalqaro tanlov o'quvchilarga fan va muhandislik sohalaridagi bilimlarini amaliy loyihalar orqali namoyish etish imkoniyatini beradi.
benefits_en: A strong portfolio boost for university applications
benefits_uz: Kuchli portfolio va universitet arizalari uchun qo'shimcha yutuq

grants.description_en: A program dedicated to the Sustainable Development Goals, water resources in Central Asia, and discussion of the Aral Sea problem.
grants.description_uz: Bu barqaror rivojlanish maqsadlari, Markaziy Osiyodagi suv resurslari, va Orol muammosi muhokamasiga bag'ishlangan dastur.
benefits_en: Field trips around the Aral region and hands-on experience
A chance to contribute to solving an ecological problem
All costs covered by the German MFA and IHE Delft
benefits_uz: Orol atrofiga safarlar va amaliy tajriba
Ekologik muammoni hal qilishda o'z hissasini qo'shish imkoniyati
Barcha harajatlari German MFA va IHE Delft tomonidan qoplanadi

grants.description_en: 🌪 Developed by MIT, LaunchX is an international program that lets students launch a startup, intern at real companies, and grow within a global network.
grants.description_uz: 🌪 MIT (Massachusetts Institute of Technology) tomonidan ishlab chiqilgan LaunchX — o'quvchilarga startap ochish, real kompaniyalarda internship qilish va global tarmoqda rivojlanish imkonini beruvchi xalqaro dastur.
benefits_en: Deep knowledge of startups and business
Work on a real startup or intern at one
benefits_uz: Startap va biznes bo'yicha chuqur bilimlar
Haqiqiy startap ustida ishlash yoki startapda internship qilish

extra_links.label_en: Our podcast with a program winner

grants.description_en: A fully funded one-year master's degree at any UK university, covering tuition, living costs, and travel.
grants.description_uz: Buyuk Britaniyaning istalgan universitetida bir yillik magistratura uchun to'liq moliyalashtirilgan stipendiya. O'qish, yashash va yo'l xarajatlarini qoplaydi.
benefits_en: Monthly living stipend and travel costs
Access to the global Chevening alumni network

grants.description_en: Funded graduate study, research, or teaching in the United States for international students.
grants.description_uz: AQShda magistratura, tadqiqot yoki o'qitish uchun xalqaro talabalarga moliyaviy yordam beruvchi dastur.

grants.description_en: Scholarships for joint master's programs delivered by university consortia across Europe.
grants.description_uz: Yevropadagi universitetlar konsortsiumlari tomonidan tashkil etilgan qo'shma magistratura dasturlari uchun stipendiyalar.
benefits_en: Study in two or more European countries
A joint degree from multiple universities
benefits_uz: Ikki yoki undan ortiq Yevropa davlatida o'qish

grants.description_en: German Academic Exchange Service scholarships for master's and PhD study in Germany.
grants.description_uz: Germaniyada magistratura va PhD uchun Germaniya akademik almashinuv xizmati stipendiyalari.

grants.description_en: An Uzbek government scholarship funding study at top foreign universities, with a return-to-work commitment.
grants.description_uz: O'zbekiston hukumatining xorijning yetakchi universitetlarida o'qishni moliyalashtiruvchi stipendiyasi, vatanga qaytib ishlash sharti bilan.

grants.description_en: A fellowship supporting outstanding PhD students in machine learning and AI research.
grants.description_uz: Mashinali o'qitish va sun'iy intellekt sohasidagi iqtidorli PhD talabalarini qo'llab-quvvatlovchi grant.

grants.description_en: A fully funded one-year master's in Global Affairs at Tsinghua University, Beijing.
grants.description_uz: Pekindagi Tsinghua universitetida Global Affairs bo'yicha bir yillik to'liq moliyalashtirilgan magistratura.
benefits_uz: O'qish, turar joy va ovqatlanish to'liq

grants.description_en: Full funding for any graduate degree at Stanford University, across all disciplines.
grants.description_uz: Stanford universitetida istalgan yo'nalishdagi magistratura/aspirantura uchun to'liq moliyalashtirish.

grants.description_en: A Japanese government scholarship for undergraduate, master's, and PhD study in Japan.
grants.description_uz: Yaponiyada bakalavr, magistratura va PhD uchun Yaponiya hukumati stipendiyasi.

faqs.question_en: What documents do I usually need for a scholarship application?
faqs.answer_en: Most scholarships require: a CV/resume, academic transcripts, a motivation/personal statement, 2-3 reference letters, proof of English proficiency (IELTS/TOEFL), and a copy of your passport. Always check the specific program's checklist.
faqs.question_uz: Stipendiyaga ariza topshirish uchun odatda qanday hujjatlar kerak?
faqs.answer_uz: Ko'pchilik stipendiyalar uchun kerak bo'ladi: CV/rezyume, akademik transkript, motivatsion xat, 2-3 ta tavsiyanoma, ingliz tili sertifikati (IELTS/TOEFL) va pasport nusxasi. Har doim aniq dasturning ro'yxatini tekshiring.
faqs.keywords: documents required cv transcript motivation reference letters passport hujjatlar

faqs.question_en: What is a motivation letter and how do I write a good one?
faqs.answer_en: A motivation letter explains why you want the scholarship, what makes you a strong fit, and how it connects to your goals. Be specific and honest: tell a real story, link your past to your future plans, and avoid generic phrases. Keep it to about one page.
faqs.question_uz: Motivatsion xat nima va uni qanday yozish kerak?
faqs.answer_uz: Motivatsion xat nega aynan shu stipendiyani xohlashingizni, nega mos nomzod ekanligingizni va u maqsadlaringizga qanday bog'lanishini tushuntiradi. Aniq va halol bo'ling: haqiqiy hikoya ayting, o'tmishingizni kelajak rejalaringizga bog'lang, umumiy iboralardan qoching. Taxminan bir bet hajmida.
faqs.keywords: motivation letter personal statement essay write motivatsion xat

faqs.question_en: Do I need IELTS or TOEFL?
faqs.answer_en: Most English-language programs require proof of English. IELTS and TOEFL are the most widely accepted. Required scores vary, but many master's programs ask for IELTS 6.5-7.0. Some programs waive it if you studied in English before.
faqs.answer_uz: Ingliz tilidagi ko'pchilik dasturlar til sertifikatini talab qiladi. IELTS va TOEFL eng keng tarqalgani. Talab qilinadigan ball farq qiladi, lekin ko'p magistratura dasturlari IELTS 6.5-7.0 so'raydi. Ba'zi dasturlar avval ingliz tilida o'qigan bo'lsangiz, undan voz kechadi.
faqs.keywords: ielts toefl english test language requirement til sertifikat

faqs.answer_en: It depends. 'Fully funded' usually means tuition, a living stipend, and sometimes travel and insurance are covered. 'Partial' scholarships cover only part of the cost. Always read the funding section of each grant carefully.
faqs.answer_uz: Bu dasturga bog'liq. 'To'liq moliyalashtirilgan' odatda o'qish to'lovi, yashash stipendiyasi, ba'zan yo'l va sug'urtani qoplaydi. 'Qisman' stipendiyalar xarajatning faqat bir qismini qoplaydi. Har bir grantning moliyalashtirish qismini diqqat bilan o'qing.
faqs.keywords: fully funded partial funding cost tuition stipend moliyalashtirish

faqs.question_en: Can I apply to more than one scholarship at the same time?
faqs.answer_en: Yes, and you usually should. Applying to several increases your chances. Just track each deadline carefully and tailor your essays to each program rather than sending one generic version.
faqs.question_uz: Bir vaqtning o'zida bir nechta stipendiyaga ariza topshira olamanmi?
faqs.answer_uz: Ha, va odatda topshirganingiz ma'qul. Bir nechtasiga topshirish imkoniyatingizni oshiradi. Faqat har bir muddatni diqqat bilan kuzating va esselaringizni har bir dasturga moslang, bitta umumiy nusxa yubormang.
faqs.keywords: multiple apply several deadlines chances bir nechta ariza

faqs.question_en: When should I start preparing my application?
faqs.answer_en: Start 6-12 months before the deadline. Language tests, reference letters, and strong essays all take time. Early preparation also gives you room to apply to several programs without rushing.
faqs.answer_uz: Muddatdan 6-12 oy oldin boshlang. Til imtihonlari, tavsiyanomalar va kuchli esselar vaqt talab qiladi. Erta tayyorgarlik bir nechta dasturga shoshilmasdan ariza topshirishga imkon beradi.
faqs.keywords: when start preparing timeline deadline plan qachon tayyorlash

faqs.answer_en: Most programs ask for 1-3 letters from people who know your academic or professional work well, like professors or supervisors. Ask them early, share your CV and goals, and give them at least 3-4 weeks before the deadline.
faqs.answer_uz: Ko'pchilik dasturlar sizning akademik yoki professional ishingizni yaxshi biladigan kishilardan (professorlar, rahbarlar) 1-3 ta xat so'raydi. Ulardan oldindan so'rang, CV va maqsadlaringizni ulashing, muddatdan kamida 3-4 hafta oldin bering.
faqs.keywords: reference recommendation letters professor supervisor tavsiyanoma

faqs.question_en: Do I need work experience to apply?
faqs.answer_en: It varies. Some scholarships (like Chevening or Humphrey) require 1-5+ years of experience. Others, especially for fresh graduates, do not. Check the eligibility section of each grant.
faqs.question_uz: Ariza topshirish uchun ish tajribasi kerakmi?
faqs.answer_uz: Bu farq qiladi. Ba'zi stipendiyalar (masalan Chevening yoki Humphrey) 1-5+ yillik tajriba talab qiladi. Boshqalari, ayniqsa yangi bitiruvchilar uchun, talab qilmaydi. Har bir grantning shartlar bo'limini tekshiring.
faqs.keywords: work experience required eligibility years ish tajriba

faqs.question_en: What is GrantBek and what can it do?
faqs.answer_en: GrantBek is a bot that helps you discover educational grants and scholarships, answers common questions about applications, and can suggest grants matching your field, country, and funding needs. Try /search, /categories, or /deadlines.
faqs.question_uz: GrantBek nima va u nima qila oladi?
faqs.answer_uz: GrantBek ta'lim grantlari va stipendiyalarni topishga yordam beradigan, ariza bo'yicha savollarga javob beradigan va yo'nalishingiz, mamlakat hamda moliya ehtiyojingizga mos grantlarni taklif qiladigan botdir. /search, /categories yoki /deadlines ni sinab ko'ring.
faqs.keywords: what grantbek about help bot features nima yordam

faqs.answer_en: Most reputable scholarships are free to apply for. Be cautious of any program asking you to pay a fee to apply or to 'guarantee' a result — that is a common scam.
faqs.answer_uz: Obro'li stipendiyalarning aksariyatiga ariza topshirish bepul. Ariza uchun to'lov so'raydigan yoki natijani 'kafolatlaydigan' dasturlardan ehtiyot bo'ling — bu ko'p uchraydigan firibgarlik.
faqs.keywords: application fee cost free scam pay to'lov firibgarlik

faqs.question_en: Can I apply if my GPA is not very high?
faqs.answer_en: Often yes. Many scholarships look at the whole person: leadership, impact, essays, and references — not just grades. A strong story and clear goals can outweigh an average GPA. Read each program's criteria.
faqs.question_uz: GPA juda yuqori bo'lmasa ham ariza topshira olamanmi?
faqs.answer_uz: Ko'pincha ha. Ko'p stipendiyalar butun shaxsga qaraydi: liderlik, ta'sir, esselar va tavsiyalar — faqat baholarga emas. Kuchli hikoya va aniq maqsadlar o'rtacha GPA dan ustun kelishi mumkin. Har bir dasturning mezonlarini o'qing.
faqs.keywords: gpa grades low average requirement marks baho

faqs.question_en: How do I track scholarship deadlines?
faqs.answer_en: Use the /deadlines command to see grants with upcoming deadlines. It's smart to keep your own calendar too, working backwards from each deadline to plan when to request references and finish essays.
faqs.answer_uz: Yaqinlashayotgan muddatli grantlarni ko'rish uchun /deadlines buyrug'idan foydalaning. Shaxsiy taqvim yuritish ham foydali — har bir muddatdan orqaga hisoblab, tavsiya so'rash va esse yozish vaqtini rejalashtiring.
faqs.keywords: deadlines track calendar dates upcoming muddat kuzatish
